package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for missing_cancel_call: Derived contexts where deslop cannot find a local cancel() or defer cancel() call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: context; severity: contextual.
func scenario240Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(context.Background(), http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
}
